summaryPatterns: I'm a Senior iOS Developer (5+ years) specializing in Swift/UIKit, built high-load apps serving 1M+ users with 98% crash-free rate
I'm an experienced iOS Developer (4+ years) focused on e-commerce and fintech, delivered features that increased conversion by 18% and reduced crashes by 25%
I'm a iOS Team Lead (7+ years) with expertise in real-time systems, led development of Top 100 App Store apps serving 10k+ concurrent users
I'm a Mobile Developer (3+ years) proficient in SwiftUI/UIKit, optimized app performance reducing load times from 1.6s to 0.8s and memory usage by 40%
I'm a iOS Developer (5+ years) experienced in full development cycle, built CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time from hours to 15 minutes
achievementPhrases: Reduced app crash rate from 93% to 98% using Firebase Crashlytics
Decreased average load time from 1.6s to 0.8s through caching optimization
Cut deployment time from 30-40 minutes to 5-7 minutes with CI/CD pipeline
Increased daily order delivery capacity by 13% with multi-order service
Improved conversion from cart to order by 18% with delivery calculation feature
Reduced scroll lag by 35% in product catalog optimization
Achieved 60 FPS performance with 10k+ concurrent users
Decreased onboarding time from 2 weeks to 1 week with technical documentation
Increased non-cash payment percentage by 4% with payment flow optimization
Reduced network requests by 62% with payment provider triggers
Fixed 15 memory leaks by migrating from Router to Coordinator pattern
Achieved 5% conversion rate in recommendations block implementation
Accelerated development by 3 months with reusable component factories
Reached Top 100 App Store ranking for food delivery app
Reduced render time from 1.8s to 0.9s with image loading optimization
Served 50k+ daily transactions in e-commerce modules development
Cut repeat order flow from 6 to 2 taps in water delivery app
Achieved weekly 10-15% sprint velocity growth with design system
Reduced memory usage by 25% through performance optimization
keyResponsibilities: Develop and maintain iOS applications using Swift and UIKit/SwiftUI
Implement complex business logic and user interfaces
Integrate REST APIs and handle network layer architecture
Optimize app performance, memory usage, and loading times
Set up CI/CD pipelines and automation processes
Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers
Collaborate with design teams to implement pixel-perfect UI
Handle App Store deployment and release management
Write unit and UI tests to ensure code quality
Refactor legacy code and improve application architecture
redFlags: Using generic phrases without specific metrics or achievements
Focusing only on technical tasks without business impact
Not mentioning App Store deployment experience
Lacking team collaboration or code review experience
Missing CI/CD or testing experience for senior positions
Not showing progression in responsibility levels
notes: Сильные iOS-разработчики демонстрируют глубокое знание Swift и экосистемы Apple, опыт работы с полным циклом разработки от архитектуры до публикации в App Store. Важно показывать измеримые достижения: снижение времени загрузки, увеличение конверсии, оптимизацию производительности. Ценится опыт настройки CI/CD, работы в командах, менторинга. Для Middle+ позиций критичен опыт архитектурных решений (MVVM, VIPER, Clean Architecture), работы с реальными нагрузками и сложной бизнес-логикой. Senior-разработчики должны показывать лидерские качества, опыт оптимизации процессов разработки, влияние на продуктовые метрики. Особенно ценится опыт в высоконагруженных системах (финтех, e-commerce, доставка) с большим количеством пользователей.
